notes: 2026-07-14/15 nightly: One new closed trade since 07-13 session: RUNE LONG (07-13 11:04 UTC, score 7, ADX 39, RSI 62 at entry, conservative EMA-recross, 4H aligned) closed -17.5% SL in 45 min (fast whipsaw, clean execution, no bug). RUNE now meets the standing removal bar on the FULL history: 7 trades, WR 14% (1W/6L), total PnL -9.15% (avg -1.3%), 5+ trades. This is not just stale pre-gate data - RUNE is 0/2 under the CURRENT conservative-only + MIN_SCORE>=7 regime too (07-12 -8.0%, 07-13 -17.5%), both fast SL hits (45min-2h), both with an ADX-bonus-only score of 7 (no cloud-width bonus). Removed RUNE from WATCHLIST (13 coins remain). Explicitly did NOT remove ETH despite also numerically meeting the blended removal bar (7T/29%WR/-1.8%avg): all 7 ETH losses predate the 07-10 has_conservative gate and are aggressive-entry artifacts from a failure mode already structurally eliminated; ETH has zero conservative-entry trades to judge the current regime by. Removing coins on pre-fix blended data repeats the exact regime-blending trap flagged since 06-16 - only RUNE has current-regime confirmation. Re-checked score>=7 conservative EV with the new close: n=6, 4W/2L, avg +1.82% (down from +5.68% at n=5) - still net positive, both new losses are RUNE. EXCLUDING RUNE, score>=7 conservative is n=4 (AAVE+2.2, DOGE+2.7, INJ+26.8, ARB+4.7): 4/4 positive, avg +9.1% - RUNE was the sole drag on an otherwise clean band. This supports keeping MIN_SCORE=7 rather than reverting; not raising further either (n=4-6 still thin, no reason to move). Observed but NOT acted on (n=3 per bucket, too thin): among score=7 trades, cloud-width-bonus entries (AAVE, DOGE, ARB) are 3/3 positive avg +3.2%, while ADX-bonus-only entries (INJ, RUNE x2) are 1/3 positive avg +0.4% - watch if this holds with more data before ever touching signal_weights. Did NOT touch TRAIL_PCT, MIN_ADX, TP_RATIO, MAX_TRADES, SESSION - no new evidence either way. No bugs found: RUNE execution was clean (signal->fill->SL/TP placement->close, R:R 1:2.0 confirmed), all Jul 14 502s transient HL gateway errors with successful retry/backoff, no orphan PID, no silent restarts. Verified tracker.py stats.win_rate already uses correct lev_pct-based win/loss classification (state.json wins=16/losses=35/decided=51/WR=31.4% matches report) - the separate v1.13.0 (07-13 23:08 UTC, ai_brain/review.py pathway) fix to review.py brought ITS OWN analytics in line with what tracker.py already did correctly; not a new bug, just two pathways syncing up.
